title: VLoadModel Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub VLoadModel (Sequence As String, Object As String, Path As String)
parameters:
Sequence	String containing the name of a sequence in the current EPSON RC+ project.

Object	String containing the name of a object. The object must be a Correlation, Geometric or Polar.

Path	Full path name of the file to load the model from, excluding extension.
description: Load a vision model from a disk file.
notes:
An error will occur if the model data in the file is the wrong type. For example, if you try to load a polar model into a correlation, an error will occur.

If you supply a file extension, it is ignored. There are two or more files associated with fileName.

For correlation and geometric models, the ModelOrgX and ModelOrgY values are restored along with the model window width and height.

For polar models, the Radius, Thickness, and AngleOffset are restored.
see_also:
VSaveModel

VLoadModel Example

VB Example:

m_spel.VLoadModel("seq01", "corr01", "c:\models\part1")

C# Example:

m_spel.VLoadModel("seq01", "corr01", @"d:\models\part1");
